description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and has graphic and flock print with 'Just can't help myself' printed on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Tickle your funny bone and make the world laugh with you with the lettering 'Just can't help myself' on this T-shirt from mr. men. Team this tee with jeans and canvas shoes, and revel in the comfort of the cotton fabric. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
